positive: A stylized, whimsical illustration of a forest creature (like a fox or deer) making friends with celestial elements, specifically constellations and glowing nebula dust. The scene should be rendered with clean, bold lines, high contrast, and vibrant yet soothing color gradients (deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and warm gold accents). The main subject should be centered, appearing as a stylized silhouette against a detailed, cosmic background. The composition must be suitable for apparel printing, featuring large negative space and distinct color blocking. Style should be a blend of modern graphic illustration and ethereal concept art. Studio lighting, vector art quality, perfect symmetry, maximalist detailing but clean edges, flat graphic design feel, high detail.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, artifact, bad anatomy, low resolution, messy, grunge, dirty, extra limbs, noise, signature, sketch, photo, realistic photograph
